Source.Name: noctalia-qs
Source.Summary: Flexible toolkit for making desktop shells with QtQuick (Noctalia fork)
Source.Description: noctalia-qs is a custom fork of Quickshell, a flexible toolkit for making desktop shells with QtQuick, for Wayland and X11. It serves as the supported runtime for the Noctalia shell ecosystem, providing features and patches specific to Noctalia, such as ext-background-effect-v1 support.

Package.Name: noctalia-qs
Package.Summary: Flexible toolkit for making desktop shells with QtQuick (Noctalia fork)
Package.Description: noctalia-qs is a custom fork of Quickshell, a flexible toolkit for making desktop shells with QtQuick, for Wayland and X11. It serves as the supported runtime for the Noctalia shell ecosystem, providing features and patches specific to Noctalia, such as ext-background-effect-v1 support.
